title: Currency Exchange Office
subtitle: Live currency and gold prices
name: Full Name
submitSuccess: Thank you for your submission. We will contact you ASAP.
footerText: Contact us for exchange services and inquiries.
goldSubtitle: Live gold market price with daily movement
heroTrustText: Exchange your money with confidence, fair rates, and reliable customer support.
heroRatesText: Stay updated with real-time exchange rates and gold market prices.
heroServiceText: Send an inquiry or money transfer request and our office will contact you as soon as possible.
converterSubtitle: Check live foreign currency exchange rates
aboutText: Shabakt Naqdia is a trusted currency exchange and money service office with more than 13 years of experience helping customers exchange currency, check gold prices, and request money transfer services.
trustedOfficeText: We provide professional service with clear communication and customer care.
fairRatesText: We keep customers updated with live market rates and transparent pricing.
secureServiceText: Your requests are handled carefully and professionally by our office.
escrowText: Our office offers an escrow service where we securely hold the money between two parties until both sides complete their agreement. The funds will only be released after a written agreement is signed by both parties and all conditions are met.
sendMoneyExplain: You can send us the payment through a bank transfer. Our office will receive the money and deliver it to the second party in cash at our location. Once your request is submitted, we will contact you to confirm the details and complete the process safely.
paymentMethod: How will you send the money to us? (Bank transfer, cash, etc.)
deliveryMethod: How should we deliver the money to the receiver? (Cash pickup, bank transfer, etc.)
economyNewsSubtitle: Latest updates about currency exchange, gold, silver, and global markets.
globalMarketText: Currency prices can change because of interest rates, inflation, oil prices, and international market movement.
goldNewsTitle: Gold prices move with market demand
goldNewsText: Gold is often affected by the US dollar, global uncertainty, and investor demand.
currencyNewsText: Our office follows market movement to help customers stay updated before exchanging or sending money.
escrowStepOne: Both parties agree on the terms.
escrowStepTwo: Both parties sign a written agreement.
escrowStepThree: Our office safely holds the money.
escrowStepFour: Money is released when conditions are completed.
heroSlide1Text: We provide fast and reliable currency exchange and money transfer services worldwide.
heroSlide2Title: Pay by Bank, Receive in Cash Safely
heroSlide2Text: Send money through bank transfer and your receiver can collect it in cash securely from our office.
heroSlide3Text: We transfer money across the Middle East, Europe, and North America with trusted service.
ruleName: The sender name must match the official government ID.
rulePayment: We do NOT release any money to the receiver before receiving full payment from the sender.
ruleContact: After submitting, our office will contact you to confirm and complete the process.
addressFull: Unit No. 11, Lower Floor, Saywan Bazaar, Sulaymaniyah, Kurdistan Region, Iraq
liveRatesComparedUsd: Live exchange rates compared to 1 USD.
inquiryDescription: Have a question about exchange rates, transfers, or our services? Fill in the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
